# Feature Merge: <feature name>

## Summary

This pull request merges the feature branch `<feature-branch>` into `development`.

It introduces the following capability:

* Brief description of the feature
* Key functionality added
* Any important design decisions

---

## Type of Change

* [ ] New feature
* [ ] Performance improvement
* [ ] Refactor
* [ ] Bug fix
* [ ] Documentation update
* [ ] Other (describe below)

## Implementation Details

Describe the main technical aspects of the implementation:

* Key algorithms or design decisions
* New modules or files added
* Major modifications to existing code
* Any assumptions or limitations

---

## Testing

* [ ] Unit tests added or updated
* [ ] Existing tests pass
* [ ] Manual testing performed
* [ ] Example scripts verified

Testing notes:

* Describe specific tests run
* Include commands if useful

* [ ] No significant performance impact
* [ ] Performance improved
* [ ] Performance impact expected (explain below)
